goals.title: Deploy Recova Brain MCP staging to Google Cloud Run using the billing...
goals.objective: Deploy Recova Brain MCP staging to Google Cloud Run using the billing-enabled fallback project slit-497603, preserve bearer-token auth and MCP tool order, verify live MCP smoke against the Cloud Run URL plus no-auth rejection, update local docs/evidence for the fallback project and deployment status, and leave no leaked secrets or debug artifacts.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP/MCP live surface: Cloud Run service recova-brain-mcp-staging in slit-497603 reaches Ready and authenticated MCP smoke passes against /mcp with tool_count=25.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/recova-brain-supabase-mcp-deploy-v1/cloud-run-mcp-smoke.json with status=ok, tool_count=25, service URL, build/deploy revision evidence.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/recova-brain-supabase-mcp-deploy-v1/cloud-run-mcp-smoke.json: PASS mcp_lab_smoke ok; tool_count=25; Cloud Build 7279c920-18a7-42ba-acd6-f363ce89252d SUCCESS; Cloud Run revision recova-brain-mcp-staging-00003-qbb Ready with 100% traffic at https://recova-brain-mcp-staging-i3pqv2n2rq-du.a.run.app/mcp.
successCriteria.notes: Initial 401 was caused by trailing newline in Secret Manager token; fixed by adding trimmed version 2 and redeploying.

successCriteria.scenario: Security edge: the same Cloud Run /mcp endpoint rejects unauthenticated requests and no secret/token value is printed or written to evidence.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/recova-brain-supabase-mcp-deploy-v1/cloud-run-mcp-no-auth.json with auth_rejected plus safety scan showing no token/raw PII/local path leak in deliverables.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/evidence/recova-brain-supabase-mcp-deploy-v1/cloud-run-mcp-no-auth.json: PASS mcp_lab_smoke auth_rejected; refined deliverable safety scan SAFETY_SCAN_OK files=6 patterns=5; no token value printed or stored.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression/documentation: local MCP smoke/tests still pass, MCP tool order remains 25, and runbook/final evidence document slit-497603 fallback without claiming recova-brain-mcp billing is fixed.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused pytest/compile/type/lint outputs, MCP_ORDER_OK count=25 if run, updated runbook/evidence JSON, git diff check, and debug artifact cleanup receipt.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Focused pytest 7 passed; compileall passed; ruff passed; basedpyright --level error returned 0 errors/0 warnings/0 notes; JSON_VALIDATION_OK files=3; EVIDENCE_SHAPE_OK; git diff --check passed; runbook/draft/plan/gcp-readiness document slit-497603 fallback and recova-brain-mcp billing blocker.
successCriteria.notes: scripts/recova_mcp/mcp_lab_smoke.py is in warning band at 232 pure LOC; do not expand further without splitting.

goals.evidence: Cloud Run staging live in slit-497603; authenticated and unauthenticated MCP smokes passed; docs/evidence updated; validation gates passed; cleanup receipt recorded.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/recova-brain-mcp-staging-20260709/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/recova-brain-mcp-staging-20260709/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: Cloud Run staging live in slit-497603; authenticated and unauthenticated MCP smokes passed; docs/evidence updated; validation gates passed; cleanup receipt recorded.

codexGoal.objective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/recova-brain-mcp-staging-20260709/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/recova-brain-mcp-staging-20260709/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
